title: Dusk Insanity (Horror Modpack)
description: Suffer anxiety and perish to the smart insane monsters with this horror modpack!
body:
![DuskInsanity Long Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31ebee578fc63098f42ae04b1b0d5a6253b950b.png)

## 🌒 Dusk Insanity - Horror Redefined in Minecraft

**Dusk Insanity** is a deeply immersive **horror survival modpack** that plunges you into a relentless world where every sound, shadow, and breath could be your last.

Featuring **smart, reactive monsters**, **sanity mechanics**, **temperature and thirst**, and an array of **atmospheric audio/visual mods**, this modpack isn't just scary — it's a **full sensory experience**.

> Run. Hide. Listen. Survive. Or descend into madness.

---

### 🧠 They Hear You. They Hunt You.

Monsters are no longer mindless.
With enhanced **AI** and mechanics, they:

* See your torchlight.
* Hear your footsteps, block breaking — even your **real microphone input**.
* Adapt to the environment — spiders crawl smarter, creepers blend with nature, and the forest is never truly empty.

---

### 🌊 Thalassophobia Mode: On

It's not just the woods and caves anymore.
The **oceans are alive** — filled with creatures that **see better, move faster, and detect you before you can react**. The deep is no longer just dark — it’s *aware*.

---

### 🧠 The Sanity Slips...

As your **sanity meter** drops, the world begins to distort.
Hallucinations, whispering voices, flickering shadows...
You’ll start to see things others don’t. And the longer you survive, the **less you trust your own senses**.
Even your teammates may become unreliable - their sanity affects what *they* see and hear, too.

![Low Sanity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc511a20bdfd162784afbd0e0a8b84cb6559d7f1.jpeg)

---

### 🧊 Temperature, Thirst & True Survival

* **Temperature mechanics** mean you’ll freeze at night, burn in the desert, and need proper clothing and shelter.
* **Thirst** must be managed - not every water source is safe.
* You’re not just running from monsters - you’re fighting to survive your own body.

![Cold Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61f41f9b599dafa3e5e4e2b4d4953f694e22840f.jpeg)

---

### 🔊 Immersive Sound & Vision

With detailed **ambient sound mods**, **occlusion-based audio**, and **atmospheric visuals**, you'll hear things crawling in the caves... even if they’re not real.
Or are they?

Includes:

* 3D positional sounds
* Footstep reverb and echo
* Environmental fog, lighting tweaks, and immersive UI

---

### 🤝 Built for Multiplayer (If You Dare)

* 🧩 **Essential Mod** for easy P2P multiplayer (no server setup required)
* 🎙️ **Simple Voice Chat** support — yes, they *can hear you*
* Fully synced **sanity & survival systems** across players

> Play with friends... or lose them to insanity.

---

### ⚠️ System Requirements & Tips

This is a **demanding** modpack. Make sure to:

* Use **at least 16GB RAM** (8GB minimum allocated to Minecraft)
* Play with **8–12 render distance** for optimal immersion
* Disable shaders manually if needed
* Low-end PCs should avoid this pack, or expect real-world suffering too

---

### 📌 Ideal For:

* Fans of **psychological horror and immersive survival**
* Streamers and YouTubers looking to challenge their sanity
* Friends who want to scream together
* Players who enjoy a challenge beyond hunger and health

---
